nasb.text: If anyone says to you, ‘Why are you doing this?’ you say, ‘The Lord has need of it’; and immediately he will send it back here.”

esv.text: If anyone says to you, ‘Why are you doing this?’ say, ‘The Lord has need of it and will send it back here immediately.’”

cnv.text: 如果有人問你們：‘為甚麼這樣作？’你們就說：‘主需要牠，並且很快會送還到這裡來。’”

ccb.text: 若有人问你们为什么这样做，就说，‘主要用它，很快会把它送回来。’”

csbs.text: 如果有人问你们为什么这么做，你们就说‘主需要它，会很快把它送回这里来的。’”
